T~L~215~-875~0~#0000FF~monospace~8pt~~~~comment~Control Logic Signals: 
 
Sel-2 Sel-1 -> B-x-1 B-x-2  ENB-x  STATE
 
0     0     -> GND   GND    GND        "Z"
0     1     -> VCC   GND    PWM/BLK    "FWD"
1     0     -> GND   VCC    PWM/BLK    "REV"
1     1     -> DCC1  DCC2   DCC/BLK    "DCC"~1~start~gge34998~0~pinpart
T~L~865~-555~0~#0000FF~~8pt~~~~comment~* optional, only for PFAIL option~1~start~gge20082~0~pinpart

T~L~585~-330~0~#0000FF~~9pt~~~~comment~The Bridge Pairs can be configured to run as a Mono Block. 
Jumper position (1-2) -> MONO mode.
Jumper position (2-3) -> DUAL mode. 
 
WARNING: ALL jumpers blocks must be set to the correct option.~1~start~gge24580~0~pinpart
